targets.notes: Top priority. src/util.rs. Very high tractability. Truncation postconditions, prefix, non-empty. Pure functional.
Top priority. src/config.rs Config::validate. Decidable conjunction of arithmetic constraints. Very high tractability.
src/quorum/majority.rs Configuration::vote_result. High tractability. Majority quorum. aeneas-safe variant exists.
src/quorum/majority.rs Configuration::committed_index. Medium tractability. Sort-then-index. aeneas-safe variant exists.
src/raft_log.rs RaftLog::find_conflict. High tractability. Scan for first term mismatch.
src/raft_log.rs RaftLog::maybe_append. Medium tractability. Depends on find_conflict.

next_steps: Run Task 2: informal spec for limit_size (simplest entry point).
Run Task 3: Lean spec for limit_size once elan/network available.
Run Task 8: Aeneas extraction for vote_result/committed_index (have aeneas-feature variants).
